title: Andy Walker
text: Home * People * Andy Walker Andy Walker [1] Andrew N. (Andy) Walker , a British mathematician and computer scientist, affiliated with the School of Mathematical Sciences, University of Nottingham [2] , with research interests in game theory and as a chess player [3] , in computer chess. He published in the ICGA Journal on search algorithms to solve certain chess problems - in particular helpmates and series-helpmates [4] , and on search heuristics in the KQKR endgame [5] , lectured at two Advances in Computer Chess conferences, and is author of the didactic chess program NotChess , written in C and originated as a simple program to help teach university students taking a game theory course [6] [7] .
